crime.value: Murder of high school girl Ann by stabbing, body planted in toy store storage room to frame the owners
crime.quote: It was the body of a high school girl named Ann. It was there in the closet. She had been stabbed.

victim.value: High school girl named Ann who was stabbed to death
victim.quote: It was the body of a high school girl named Ann. It was there in the closet. She had been stabbed.

closed_world.value: Mary's toyshop - a locked two-story toy store with limited access points and duplicate keys
closed_world.quote: We locked all the doors and windows at night. We don't even have a duplicate key

culprit_and_motive.value: A wanted criminal who disguised himself as a customer to plant the body and frame the toy store owners
culprit_and_motive.quote: Remember that pale man with the huge black suitcase who bought a talking doll for his niece. It was him.

resolution.value: Sam deduces the criminal disguised himself as a customer with a suitcase containing the body; police catch him
resolution.quote: The police caught him finally. They told you to come and collect your bounty from the police station later

investigator.value: Sam, a college student and neighbor who solves the case through logical deduction
investigator.quote: I was a normal college student with an over-enthusiastic and a little unconventional neighbor

suspect_architecture.value: Limited suspect pool: Anthony (rival shop owner with clear motive), mysterious pale man customer, and implicitly the shop owners themselves who are suspected by police
suspect_architecture.quote: My shop is so much better. I have the best toys. But they still steal all my customers. I wish that their shop would close down

red_herring.value: Anthony the rival shop owner is presented as the obvious suspect with clear motive and animosity, misdirecting from the true perpetrator
red_herring.quote: He always thinks of us as his rivals but we think of him as our friend

clue_fairness.value: The pale man with the huge black suitcase is described to the reader when he appears as a customer, providing fair access to the key clue
clue_fairness.quote: Remember that pale man with the huge black suitcase who bought a talking doll for his niece. It was him.

social_world.value: Small business rivalry between toy shops, family-owned establishment vs. corporate competitor, with community loyalty dynamics
social_world.quote: Everyone here knows that Mary's toyshop is the biggest rival of Anthony's Toy world

alibi.value: The murderer creates an alibi by appearing as an innocent customer making a purchase, using the shopping transaction as cover
alibi.quote: Then he came down and pretended to be an innocent customer. He bought that doll and cooked up a story

reveal_mechanic.value: Logical reconstruction of the timeline and method: disguised entry during business hours with body concealed in suitcase, not nighttime break-in
reveal_mechanic.quote: He came with the body in that big black box. He went to the third floor where there was no one

investigator_wound.value: Sam is reluctantly drawn into investigation of neighbors he cares about, conflicted between wanting to help and wanting to avoid involvement
investigator_wound.quote: I was just thinking how I had managed to get myself into this girlishness

_meta.title: ebook shruthi viswanathan the toystore murder
